name: the-four-foundations-of-golf
description: Jon Sherman's The Four Foundations of Golf — lower your scores and enjoy the game more by managing expectations, improving course strategy, practicing purposefully, and training your mental game
useCase: Helps golfers at any level improve their scores by focusing on the four areas that matter most: realistic expectations, smarter course management, purposeful practice, and a strong mental game.
knownRisks: Golf improvement requires consistent practice and realistic expectations — results vary by individual
